# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that runs directly on the master node for faster execution. The pipeline performs builds, runs tests, and deploys to production. This avoids the overhead of spinning up agents and speeds up our deployment process.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent {
        label 'master'
    }
    stages {
        stage('Build') {
            steps {
                echo 'Building the project...'
                // Add your build commands here, e.g., sh 'gradle build'
            }
        }
        stage('Test') {
            steps {
                echo 'Running tests...'
                // Add your test commands here, e.g., sh 'gradle test'
            }
        }
        stage('Deploy') {
            steps {
                echo 'Deploying to production...'
                // Add your deployment commands here, e.g., sh 'deployScript.sh'
            }
        }
    }
    post {
        always {
            echo 'Cleaning up...'
            // Add cleanup commands if necessary
        }
    }
}
